# Ship a fixtures folder for agent repro

Right now reproducing a writer.ts bug means writing an ad hoc vitest test
each time. A small library of real-shaped vault notes would let an agent
reproduce known bug classes in one command instead of re-deriving repro
steps by hand every session.
